description: During routine data reconciliation between the clinical site's Electronic Medical Record (EMR) and the EDC, the Clinical Data Manager spotted a duplicate enrollment in the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). A busy coordinator enrolled the same patient twice: first as DM-204 (correct demographics, but incomplete setup) and later as DM-205 (typo in birth year, but with a scheduled visit). Consolidate these records in OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!) by removing the duplicate record DM-205 from the study and updating the correct record DM-204. For DM-204, set the 'Secondary ID' to MRN-88492 and schedule the 'Baseline Assessment' study event for 2024-05-15.
